title: cassia abbreviata subsp. abbreviata
intro: Cassia abbreviata subsp. abbreviata, also known as the Short Cassia or Cassia abbreviata, is a plant species of the legume family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cassia abbreviata subsp. abbreviata include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and its bark and roots are also used in traditional herbal preparations.
